CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2023 Off Calendar

PROGRESS REPORT ON DEPOSIT OF DEFERRED ANNUITY
Off Calendar Aug-03-2023 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar May-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for Plaintiff's motion for compromise of claim of Minor, Skylar Griffin.

Dept. 505; Judge Gail Dekreon; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:22:15 p.m. and concluding at 02:25:27 p.m.

Plaintiff Skylar Griffin appearing represented by Andrew P. Carter, Esq.
Guardian ad Litem Kristina De Leon appearing represented by Andrew P. Carter, Esq., is placed under oath and testifies.
Defendant Deborah Janet Shin M.D. not appearing.

Counsel for Plaintiff presents brief recitation of case.
Guardian ad Litem is examined by the Court.

The matter is submitted.
The Court finds the settlement is reasonable and the Guardian ad Litem confirms it is in the best interest of the claimant.

The court hereby APPROVES Plaintiff's Motion for Compromise of Claim for the settlement amount of $495,000.00 minus the following:

1. $134,915.00 for Attorney's Fees
2. $2,000.00 for Costs

Balance of settlement in the sum of $358,085.00 shall be invested in a single-premium deferred annuity, subject to withdrawal only upon the authorization of the court.

Proposed Order Approving Compromise of Claim or Action or Disposition of Proceeds of Judgment for Minor or Person with a Disability signed.

Court orders matter continued to August 4, 2023, at 1:30 p.m. in Department 505 for progress report on deposit in deferred annuity.
